title: rubus calycinoides
intro: Rubus calycinoides, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Bramble, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rubus genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus calycinoides include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
